title: PORTLAND THERAPY PROJECT - 211info
text: PORTLAND THERAPY PROJECT PORTLAND THERAPY PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services including individual, couples, group, and gender-affirming counseling, with a focus on trauma, body-centered work, and LGBTQ2+ support. Offers letters of readiness for gender-affirming surgeries in accordance with World Professional Association for Transgender Health (WPATH) standards. 825 NE 20th Avenue Suite 250 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Email (503) 917-5737 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 917-5737 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit the website to complete the intake form. The waitlist has an anticipated wait time of a few weeks. FEES: Accepts OHP DOCUMENTS: OHP ID number AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus routes stop on Sandy Boulevard 6 blocks from agency Services: Gender Identity Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Marriage and Relationships Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
